subject: Migrate 8 test files from buildServer to buildTestApp
description: Change cv.test.ts, cv_entities.test.ts, backups.test.ts, versioning.test.ts, artifacts.test.ts, masks.test.ts, performance.test.ts, redaction.test.ts to use buildTestApp from app-builder.ts instead of buildServer. Also fix the one buildServer call in profiles.test.ts line 183.
